title: Duncan MacGillivray
extract: Duncan MacGillivray (born 25 October 1976) is a former Scotland international rugby league footballer who played as a second-row or prop in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for the Penrith Panthers and the South Sydney Rabbitohs in the NRL, and the Wakefield Trinity Wildcats in the Super League, and at international level for Scotland.
